description: OWASP AIBOM audit fixture: complete AIBOM generation, component gap detection, AIBOM-to-RBA linkage, MCP server inventory, and prompt content-addressing; synthetic AI system descriptions only.

certification_track=candidate; advance to stable after N=5 carousel runs with <10% rubric variance
